UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff James Lee as trustee of the Paula Lee RTD is present. Represented by: Hazel Chen.
Attorney Susan Parkinson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Frank Mosel is present.
Attorney Elaine K. Lee appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Sep. 29, 2014 is vacated.
